text.title: Distressed Project Diagnostic Script — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Is the project formally distressed, AND is there a >= six-week turnaround window, AND is interview access available?

branch.when: project_status == 'distressed' AND turnaround_window_weeks >= 6 AND interview_access == true
branch.conclusion: Run the full diagnostic: interview list, numeric pulls, triangulation matrix, six-week rescue plan.
Block. Resolve interview access (escalate to sponsor) before producing the diagnostic — without team voice it produces wrong root cause.
Skip. Use a lighter health-check methodology — this script is for formal turnaround engagements only.
